positive: Minimalist, symmetrical central composition featuring a stylized geometric celestial creature, combining elements of an owl, a crescent moon, and a soaring falcon. The design should be rendered in thick, negative space silhouettes against a solid, deep indigo background. Use only a limited palette of metallic gold and muted cyan accents within the geometry. High contrast, clean lines, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Art Deco and modern tattoo style fusion. Golden ratio composition, vector art look, hyper-detailed, crisp edges, ethereal glow, celestial, sacred geometry.
